summary: The diff implements both REQ-27 and REQ-28. The app name 'Dard-e-munasif' is applied in the browser tab title (index.html), the navbar/header (Layout.tsx), and the footer branding. The custom circular logo image is referenced in the header img tag and as the favicon in index.html. The logo is served from /assets/generated/dard-e-munasif-logo.dim_200x200.png. However, the actual binary image file (dard-e-munasif-logo.dim_200x200.png) does not appear in the diff as an added file, which means the physical asset may not have been committed.

missing_requirements.requirement: The logo image file (dard-e-munasif-logo.dim_200x200.png) must be saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/ and served from there.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files at all ('Added: 0'). The image asset dard-e-munasif-logo.dim_200x200.png is referenced in Layout.tsx and index.html but is not present as an added file in the diff, meaning the actual image binary was not included in the changeset.
